description: Hedge Cluster observable features per cohort wallet · v0.1 rule-based · uses only counterparty_graph.json data we already collect today. The SCORE (with weights/action-label) lives in _private/_ingest/compute_hedge_cluster_score.py per CLAUDE.md TOP RULE -1 methodology privacy.
source_caveats: counterparty_graph upstream is SMOKE_PREVIEW (0.22% cohort-tx coverage)
No timing similarity yet · v0.2 unblocks when counterparty_graph hits v0.2-full
No funding-source overlap yet · requires Polygon RPC contract-event reads (deferred)
No cross-market opposite-leg detection yet · requires per-fill outcome side join (P1)
maps_to_M_axis: M1 forward-witnessed (network snapshot · day-N+365 competitor cannot reconstruct)
maps_to_V_axis: V1 verdict-on-watchlist (operator pastes a wallet · we hedge-check it)
